description_long: This is a solid-body electric guitar with a glossy black finish and a single cutaway design, reminiscent of classic Les Paul-style guitars. The body features chrome hardware, including two humbucker pickups, a bridge with individual saddles, and control knobs for volume and tone. The neck is made of a darker wood, likely rosewood or ebony, with visible frets and dot inlays. The headstock is angled and fitted with six tuning pegs in a 3+3 configuration, and the back of the guitar is a deep, dark color with a smooth, polished surface. The instrument is designed for amplified performance and is commonly seen in urban environments such as music venues, street performances, and studios. Its robust construction and high-gloss finish make it both visually striking and durable for frequent handling.
description: A glossy black, single cutaway electric guitar with chrome hardware, two humbucker pickups, and a dark wood neck. The design is classic and robust, suitable for urban music settings.
description_view_0: Front view showing the glossy black body, chrome hardware, two humbucker pickups, control knobs, and the full neck with visible frets.
description_view_1: Side profile revealing the guitar's slim, solid body thickness and the protruding hardware components.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the smooth, dark back of the guitar and the back of the headstock with tuning pegs.
description_view_3: Opposite side profile highlighting the body thickness and the slight curvature of the back.
attribute_headstock_design: Angled headstock with 3+3 tuning peg arrangement, no visible logo, classic Les Paul-style contour
